Memories: Slop warned crewmate about a tripping hazard while approaching from behind.
Said: Easy there—don't trip on that loose floorboard!
Heard fokker say: Got it—let's get this over with.
Said: Watch where they're looking—floorboards talk when it's this quiet.
Heard fokker say: Found him—just ahead of that vent.
Heard slop say: Hey there—just checking in from behind.
Said: Watch where you're stepping—floor's giving way.
Heard slop say: Easy there—don't trip on that loose floorboard!
Said: Got it—let's get this over with.
Heard slop say: Watch where they're looking—floorboards talk when it's this quiet.
Said: Found him—just ahead of that vent.
